40

r

p
add-functional-state-scenario-to-visual-eval-harness
PROJECT/CAIRN
Lock in a webui fix that a frozen-fixture/clean-state visual-eval benchmark cannot see, by adding a functional-state scenario to a CDP harness (e.g. cairn webui harness/eval.mjs). Use after fixing a defect in a state the eval never renders (populated findings, a selected/decision/ghost node, an overlay) so a regression flags loudly. Covers the overlay-fixture + second-replay-server + localStorage-select + landmark-as-guard recipe and the CDP/segment gotchas.
116
unused
r
c
p
adversarial-decision-debate
GLOBAL
Adjudicate a contested DESIGN/PROSE change (e.g. a system-prompt edit, a policy/convention tweak) by running a steelman reformer-vs-conservative subagent

add-functional-state-scenario-to-visual-eval-harness
PROJECT/CAIRN
Lock in a webui fix that a frozen-fixture/clean-state visual-eval benchmark cannot see, by adding a functional-state scenario to a CDP harness (e.g. cairn webui harness/eval.mjs). Use after fixing a defect in a state the eval never renders (populated findings, a selected/decision/ghost node, an overlay) so a regression flags loudly. Covers the overlay-fixture + second-replay-server + localStorage-select + landmark-as-guard recipe and the CDP/segment gotchas.
116
unused
r
c
p
adversarial-decision-debate
GLOBAL
Adjudicate a contested DESIGN/PROSE change (e.g. a system-prompt edit, a policy/convention tweak) by running a steelman reformer-vs-conservative subagent debate — distinct from palantir-debate, which reviews a code diff. Use when deciding whether a proposed change is worth shipping or is already covered.
76
unused
r
c
p
adversarial-roadmap-validation
GLOBAL
Validate a project roadmap's claimed status against code/git using parallel verifier agents, then find the highest-value next move via a design-lens panel + adversarial refutation — catches factual errors solo analysis misses
56
unused
r
c
p
agent-repo-doc-architecture
GLOBAL
Structure a repo's docs so an AI coding loop boots from accurate context and a human can steer as product owner — separate stable/volatile, point don't restate, keep AGENTS.md from rotting, and weld the freshness gate to a hook (pre-push/CI matched to the repo's reality).
68
unused
r
c
p
anonymise-field-telemetry-fo
